---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something the plugin should do
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

The behavior you wish the plugin had, framed as the problem you hit.
"I want it to do X" is fine; "I can't easily do Y because the plugin Z"
is even better.

## Have you tried a workaround?

If yes, what was it and why is the workaround insufficient?

## Sketch of the solution

If you have a design in mind, share it. Otherwise, leave blank — design
discussion is welcome in the comments.

## Scope check

Is this in scope for `gemini-plugin-cc` (a Claude Code plugin that wraps
`@google/gemini-cli`), or does it belong upstream in either project?
A quick sentence explaining where the fix should live helps reviewers.
